description: High contrast dark theme with AMOLED-style pure black.

files.content:
import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const amoledTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#555555",
    focusColor: "#b388ff",
    style: "rounded",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#ff4081",
    accentForeground: "#000000",
    background: "#000000",
    border: "#555555",
    error: "#ff1744",
    errorForeground: "#ffffff",
    focusRing: "#b388ff",
    foreground: "#ffffff",
    info: "#18ffff",
    infoForeground: "#000000",
    muted: "#1a1a1a",
    mutedForeground: "#888888",
    primary: "#b388ff",
    primaryForeground: "#000000",
    secondary: "#333333",
    secondaryForeground: "#ffffff",
    selection: "#b388ff",
    selectionForeground: "#000000",
    success: "#00ff88",
    successForeground: "#000000",
    warning: "#ffea00",
    warningForeground: "#000000",
  },
  name: "amoled",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};

name: theme-amoled
title: AMOLED
